zh.lifeSummary: 當Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II於大約1239年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德時，他的父親Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I35歲，母親Alésie de VENTADOUR26歲。他和Mathilde d'Auvergne至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1282年3月21日享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II was born about 1239, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I, was 35 and his mother, Alésie de VENTADOUR, was 26. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Mathilde d'Auvergne. He died on 21 March 1282, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II est né environ 1239, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Alésie de VENTADOUR, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Mathilde d'Auvergne. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1282, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II um 1239 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I 35 und seine Mutter Alésie de VENTADOUR 26. Er hatte mit Mathilde d'Auvergne mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. März 1282 im Alter von 44 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II è nato il circa 1239 nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Alésie de VENTADOUR, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Mathilde d'Auvergne. Morì il 21 marzo 1282, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne IIが約1239年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドで生まれた時，父Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne Iは35歳，母Alésie de VENTADOURは26歳であった。彼はMathilde d'Auvergneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1282年3月21日に44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II(이)가 대략 1239년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Alésie de VENTADOUR(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Mathilde d'Auvergne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 3월 21일 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II nasceu aproximadamente 1239, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alésie de VENTADOUR, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Mathilde d'Auvergne. Ele faleceu em 21 de março de 1282, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II родился около 1239 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alésie de VENTADOUR, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Mathilde d'Auvergne. Он умер 21 марта 1282 г. в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II nació aproximadamente 1239, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne I, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alésie de VENTADOUR, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Mathilde d'Auvergne. Murió el 21 de marzo de 1282, a la edad de 44 años.
